overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} 0 = \iota (v) (\omega^ {n} \wedge \varphi) & \text {(since \omega^ {n} \wedge \varphi\equiv 0 for trivial reasons)} \\ = n \omega^ {n - 1} \wedge \iota (v) \omega \wedge \varphi & \text {(since as observed above \iota(v)\varphi\equiv 0)} \\ \Rightarrow \int_ {M} \omega^ {n - 1} \wedge \iota (v) \omega \wedge \varphi = 0 \\ \Rightarrow \iota (v) \omega = 0 \text { in } H ^ {0, 1} (M) \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} 0 = \iota (v) (\omega^ {n} \wedge \varphi) & \text{(since } \omega^ {n} \wedge \varphi\equiv 0 \text{ for trivial reasons)} \\ = n \omega^ {n - 1} \wedge \iota (v) \omega \wedge \varphi & \text{(since as observed above } \iota(v)\varphi\equiv 0\text{)} \\ \Rightarrow \int_ {M} \omega^ {n - 1} \wedge \iota (v) \omega \wedge \varphi = 0 \\ \Rightarrow \iota (v) \omega = 0 \text { in } H ^ {0, 1} (M) \end{array}
